seo.title: Our Team | Joshua Tree Health
seo.description: Meet the licensed clinicians and staff at Joshua Tree Health, an adolescent PHP and IOP program in Apex, NC for ages 10–17.

hero.title: Meet our team.
hero.sub: The clinicians and staff responsible for assessment, treatment, and support at Joshua Tree Health.

clinical.title: The clinicians your teen may work with.
clinical.intro: Our clinical team focuses on adolescent behavioral health. Admissions can walk you through who will be part of your teen’s assessment and care.

closing.title: Ask who will be part of your teen’s care.
closing.body: Admissions can explain who handles assessment, therapy, family communication, and treatment planning.
